title: aethionema glaucinum
intro: Aethionema glaucinum, also known as blue alyssum or white alyssum, is a perennial flowering plant in the mustard family that is native to the mountainous regions of Central Asia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Aethionema glaucinum include reducing inflammation, fighting off infections, and improving digestion, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can be used topically to treat skin conditions or internally to support overall health and well-being.
